$comment: Consolidated, machine-readable index of every banked TestSprite test for Nora. Source of truth is the TestSprite platform: `testsprite test list --project 4ba5d8f8-310d-41bc-bbf4-b85208bb6d44`. Every test is createdFrom:cli under the submitting account.

gitlab.runs: 394-test unit suite + 7 backend TestSprite tests (drift-immune: schema + RLS + reward RPC + auth boundaries) on every master push

githubActions.status: same command as GitLab; gated by a GitHub account Actions billing lock

cliImprovementBonus.author: lxcario
cliImprovementBonus.highlight: PR #132 added the `testsprite test flaky <id>` command to the CLI

realBugsCaughtByLoop.bug: New signup landed on a blank /app shell
realBugsCaughtByLoop.fix: Onboarding-state gate → new accounts redirect to /app/onboarding

realBugsCaughtByLoop.bug: 4-arc: routing 404 -> nav thrash -> data-dependent assertion -> stale test NAME drove a wrong assertion
Test asserted a streak counter removed by a product philosophy change (no-guilt)
realBugsCaughtByLoop.fix: Updated assertion to XP + coins (regression caught mid-flight)

realBugsCaughtByLoop.bug: Memories-due count shown twice (CTA + standalone stat tile)
Sidebar pet mood (stale DB column) contradicted room's computed mood
realBugsCaughtByLoop.fix: Sync computed mood back to pets table in getRoomState()

realBugsCaughtByLoop.bug: Progress sparkline was a bare, hard-to-read SVG
realBugsCaughtByLoop.fix: Restyled into a pixel-panel with gradient fill + gridlines

realBugsCaughtByLoop.bug: Feature overlap (Prediction/Feynman, Knowledge Web/Eureka) confused users
Onboarding tour re-showed on every fresh session (localStorage-only gate) and blocked automated navigation — also hit real users in new browsers
realBugsCaughtByLoop.fix: Gate tour server-side to genuinely new accounts (created_at < 10 min)

realBugsCaughtByLoop.bug: Post-UI-overhaul regression: room said pet mood 'sad' while sidebar said 'Neutral' (different root cause from Iter 37 — stale DB read vs activity-based compute)
realBugsCaughtByLoop.fix: Compute mood from activity in layout.tsx instead of stale DB read; fire-and-forget sync

blockedThenGreenArcs.note: These pages rendered correctly; the runner returned `blocked` because the assertion was a verbose two-branch OR that burned the agent's runway before it emitted a verdict. Each failure bundle records the agent's own 'PASS/success=true' summary. Fix was to tighten the plan to a single decisive assertion (test plan put / test update), not to change the app.

committedFailureBundles.note: Real bundles pulled from the platform via `testsprite test artifact get <runId>` and committed under .testsprite/failure/. Committed evidence per bundle: failure.json (root cause / agent summary), result.json, code.py, step snapshots, and the short run video.mp4 (each < 1 MB, force-added). The repo's `*.mp4` policy only excludes the large standalone demo recording, which is linked via YouTube in the README.

bundles.evidence: REAL BUG — History 404: root cause 'This route doesn't exist in Nora' (Iter 12)
Agent's own failure.json: 'TEST BLOCKED: PASS ... rendered as required' — proves the app was correct; the verdict format was the issue (Iter 29)
Same blocked-but-correct pattern; agent summary confirms PASS (Iter 30)

flakyDogfood.note: Nora authored the `testsprite test flaky` command (PR #132, now merged into the CLI) and ran it against its own banked suite — verbatim replay with auto-heal OFF, so nondeterministic drift cannot be masked.

results.name: Landing page loads and displays sign-up CTA

runnerLimitationsDocumented.reason: Cloud runner uses a fixed desktop viewport and ignores resize steps
runnerLimitationsDocumented.action: Test removed and documented — not faked green

runnerLimitationsDocumented.reason: Backend runner can't reach the GoTrue service (upstream issue #173)
runnerLimitationsDocumented.action: test_auth_flow.py kept in repo but NOT banked / not counted

backend.name: Schema validation — 10 core tables + FSRS + gamification columns
RLS data isolation — cards, topics, feynman all protected
RLS rejects unauthorized reward manipulation and table access

frontend.name: Landing page loads and displays sign-up CTA
Login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard
New user signup leads to onboarding wizard
Dashboard displays stats and daily quests after login
frontend.loopNote: streak regression (Iter 19) + tour gate (Iter 40); test regenerated in Iter 40 (was f10b71eb)

frontend.name: Sidebar Feynman link opens the page without a 404
frontend.loopNote: nav cleanup (Iter 39); test regenerated in Iter 40 (was 63bbf13d)

frontend.loopNote: new feature shipped under the loop (Iter 22)
